input_sources: FAO Global Ecological Zones 2010 - data/external/gez/gez_2010_wgs84.shp (FAO catalog 2fb209d0-fd34-4e5e-a3d8-a13c241eb61b, gez2010.zip, downloaded 2026-05-26)
notes: Site->GEZ spatial join: sf_use_s2(FALSE), st_within, st_nearest_feature fallback for points outside all polygons. 3 fallback site(s): AR-TF1, CA-RBM, CN-SnB. gez_method flags within vs nearest_feature.
